case_title: LAN LE VS. DWAYNE E. PATTERSON

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, LAN SERVED DEC-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DWAYNE E.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE, LAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DWAYNE E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1221 NEWHALL STREET, ROOM #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94124, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RENT DEPOSIT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DWAYNE E.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-23-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DWAYNE PATTERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED IN PART & GRANTED IN PART THE APPLICATION. THE COURT PARTIALLY GRANTED THE WAIVER AS TO THE FIRST APPEARANCE FILING FEE (ON JAN-08-2019) OF THE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR STAY OF EXECUTION ONLY AND APPLICANT MUST PAY ALL OTHER COURT FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DWAYNE E.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, LAN AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DWAYNE E. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DWAYNE E. HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
